title: Shield Timer
description: Shield Timer Mod displays a HUD showing your shield blocking time, durability, and alerts when your shield gets disabled by an axe. It also shows a center-screen notification when you successfully break or disable an enemy player's shield.
body:
# Shield Timer
A lightweight combat HUD mod that keeps you informed about everything shield-related during PvP battles.

Features
- Timer — Displays exactly how long you've been holding block in milliseconds
- Durability Display — Color-coded shield health so you know when it's about to break
- Disabled Alert — Flashing red warning when an axe disables your shield, with cooldown timer
- Blocks Counter — Tracks total attacks blocked this session
- Enemy Shields
- Break/Disable Alert — Big center-screen notification when you successfully break or disable an opponent's shield, so you know when to push
- Configuration
- All features can be toggled individually through Mod Menu. The HUD position is fully customizable with a drag-and-drop editor—just click "Edit HUD Position" in settings and drag it wherever you want.

### Dependencies
-  Fabric API
-  YACL 3.x
-  Mod Menu (recommended)
